user.title: Connect to Luxtronik 2.0
user.description: Enter the IP address of your heat pump controller.

data_description.host: Local IP address of the Luxtronik 2.0 controller (e.g. 192.168.x.x)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the heat pump. Check the IP address and make sure the controller is reachable on port 8889.

abort.already_configured: This heat pump is already configured.
abort.already_configured_benPru: A BenPru/luxtronik integration is already connected to this IP address. Running both integrations simultaneously will cause connection conflicts. Remove the luxtronik integration first.

init.title: Luxtronik 2.0 Settings
init.description: Adjust connection settings for your heat pump controller.

data_description.host: Local IP address or hostname of the Luxtronik 2.0 controller
data_description.poll_interval: How often to read data from the heat pump (10-300 seconds, default 30)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the heat pump. Check the IP address and make sure the controller is reachable on port 8889.
